text: I feel a curious mix of isolation and anticipation. The dimly lit corridor at first seems cold and uninviting, yet stepping into the vividly colored, intellectual space of research and development fills me with intrigue. Here, in the midst of technology and innovation, I feel small but also connected to larger questions about human ingenuity and our place alongside machines. This juxtaposition of emptiness and potential awakens within me both a sense of alienation and wonder.
